docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARGARITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARGARITA $2,283.20 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,330.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARGARITA $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, APPEAL DISMISSED, CASE SETTLED, DEFT TO PAY PLTF $1200 IN COMPLETE SATISFACTION OF ALL CLAIMS. 2) PAYMENT TO BE MADE IN FOUR INSTALLMENTS OF $300 EACH MONTH BEGINNING APRIL 15TH AND CONTINING EACH MONTH TILL PAID ON FULL. 3)PLTF TO DISMISS W/PREJUDICE. 4) BOTH SIDES RELEASE THE OTHER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
